findings.thai: ได้ประโยชน์ระยะยาว
findings.reason: The syllable 'โยชน์' (yot) has a falling tone (low class consonant, long vowel, dead ending). The syllable 'ยะ' (ya) has a high tone.
The syllable 'พอ' (phaw) has a mid tone, not falling.

findings.thai: ได้ยินข่าว
findings.reason: The syllable 'ข่าว' (khao) has a low tone (high class consonant with mai ek).
The syllable 'คืน' (khuen) has a mid tone, not falling.
